<svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="-10.2941 -10.2941 44.5884 44.5884" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="-10.2941" y="-10.2941" width="44.5884" height="44.5884" rx="15" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.1"/>
            <style>
        @keyframes popup {
            0% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0);
            }
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }
        #ethereum-logo {
            animation: popup 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55) forwards;
        }
    </style>
    <g id="ethereum-logo">
    <title>Ethereum</title><path fill="currentColor" d="M11.944 17.97L4.58 13.62 11.943 24l7.37-10.38-7.372 4.35h.003zM12.056 0L4.69 12.223l7.365 4.354 7.365-4.35L12.056 0z" />
    </g>
</svg>
